task_context.actionable_question: When exactly did this student start disengaging?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Flag the exact week engagement dropped. Compare to pre-drop average. Recommend admin outreach timing.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The student's engagement trajectory reveals a significant drop in weekly clicks starting in week 0, where engagement plummeted to 27 clicks from a pre-drop average of 90. This decline indicates a concerning disengagement trend that persisted with fluctuations in subsequent weeks.

Insights: Significant Engagement Drop: In week 0, the student's weekly clicks dropped to 27, a decrease of 67 from the previous week's average of 94, marking a critical point of disengagement. | Fluctuating Engagement Post-Drop: Following the initial drop, the student exhibited fluctuating engagement levels, with a peak of 98 clicks in week 1, but subsequently dropped to 4 clicks in week 2, indicating instability in engagement.

Educational implications: The significant drop in engagement suggests that the student may be struggling with course material or facing external challenges that hinder participation.

Recommendations: high - Initiate outreach to the student in week 0. - Given the drastic drop in engagement, timely intervention may help address any issues and re-engage the student.

insights.title: Significant Engagement Drop

insights.title: Fluctuating Engagement Post-Drop
insights.description: Following the initial drop, the student exhibited fluctuating engagement levels, with a peak of 98 clicks in week 1, but subsequently dropped to 4 clicks in week 2, indicating instability in engagement.

educational_implications: The significant drop in engagement suggests that the student may be struggling with course material or facing external challenges that hinder participation.

recommendations.action: Initiate outreach to the student in week 0.
recommendations.rationale: Given the drastic drop in engagement, timely intervention may help address any issues and re-engage the student.

confidence.reason: The data shows clear engagement trends with consistent metrics across weeks.

required_core_outputs.description: Identify the specific week in which engagement dropped when the data supports one.
Compare engagement after the drop with the pre-drop average.

required_supporting_outputs.description: When a specific drop week is identified, recommend outreach timing relative to that week.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
